title: polypodium reinwardtii
intro: Polypodium reinwardtii, also known as the Mountain Fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly found in tropical Asia and Australia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Polypodium reinwardtii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and act as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or infusion, and also used in traditional medicine to create tinctures and capsules, which are said to offer a range of therapeutic benefits.
